extensionDescription.message: Stable per-site browser profiles for common JavaScript and header fingerprinting surfaces.

advancedToggle.message: Use advanced CDP overrides when debugger permission is available

buildAdvanced.message: Advanced overrides: CDP environment overrides are available. DevTools conflicts automatically fall back to lite behavior.

buildLite.message: Lite mode: no debugger permission. JavaScript surfaces and request headers are handled without CDP.

buildSubtitle.message: Global protection, UA behavior, and advanced override settings.

cannotDeleteLastProfile.message: Keep at least one profile available.

earlyBootstrapUnavailable.message: Unprotected: synchronous startup injection is unavailable

enableUserScriptsRequired.message: Enable Allow User Scripts (Chrome 138+) or Developer mode, then reopen Ghost.

disableUserAgentSpoofingSubtitle.message: Leave User-Agent, UA Client Hints, and platform surfaces to the browser or another extension.

excludedDomainsSubtitle.message: Hosts or host paths listed here keep their native browser environment.

fingerprintTestExternalConfirm.message: This opens BrowserLeaks, a third-party website that will receive your IP address and browser fingerprint. Continue?

fileAccessRequired.message: Enable ‘Allow access to file URLs’ in Ghost's extension details, then reload this file.

globalConfigSubtitle.message: Global protection, GPC, UA behavior, and advanced override settings.

globalPrivacyControlSubtitle.message: Send Sec-GPC: 1 and expose navigator.globalPrivacyControl as true on all supported sites.

globalProtectionSubtitle.message: Enable Ghost protections for supported sites.

invalidExclusionRule.message: Enter a valid host or host path, such as example.com/login.

invalidSiteRule.message: Enter a valid host, such as example.com, or *.

optionsSubtitle.message: Privacy profiles, site rules, exclusions, and global behavior.

profilesSubtitle.message: Review profiles in a compact table. Edit the full configuration in a focused dialog.

siteRulesSubtitle.message: Host rules use suffix matching; * is the default for all domains.

settingsLimitReached.message: The safe rule limit has been reached. Remove an existing entry first.
